ogTitle: Sandy Ridges vs Sardine: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sandy Ridges and Sardine.
heading: Sandy Ridges vs Sardine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sandy Ridges, Queensland and Sardine, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandy Ridges and Sardine have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Sandy Ridges or Sardine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sandy Ridges has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Sardine scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sandy Ridges scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Sardine scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sandy Ridges or Sardine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandy Ridges has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
